violations.text: Eggs and cheese were observed held at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was observed stored in deli containers inside of hotel pan at the prep unit. Staff to store all foods in hotel pans directly into prep unit to maintain proper cold holding temperature. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
